heading: Abolishment
label: 5413 Abolishment
text: Effective 90 days after the transfer date, the Office of Thrift Supervision and the position of Director of the Office of Thrift Supervision are abolished.
notes: Effective DateSection effective 1 day after , except as otherwise provided, see , set out as a note under .July 21, 2010section 4 of Pub. L. 111–203section 5301 of this title
